name: Venison Chops w/ Rice & Tomatos
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the wine, water, and lemon juice together.
2. Pour over the chops, cover, and marinate in the fridge for 4-8 hours.
3. Brown the chops in a large skillet after seasoning with salt and pepper.
4. Place each chop on the bottom of a large baking dish.
5. Cut the green pepper into 1/4-inch thick rings.
6. Place the rings on top of each chop.
7. Put a scoop of rice in each ring.
8. Top each with a slice of onion and a slice of tomato.
9. Dump the canned tomatoes into a bowl and chop them into small chunks.
10. Add the bitters, garlic, salt, and pepper.
11. Pour these around the chops.
12. Cover and steam for 1 hour in an oven set to 375 degrees F.
